findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_coverage" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Returns the list of subjects and unit counts covered by Quantabble. Use this to check whether a student's topic is within scope before calling diagnose_response…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
